evidence: I love scifi and wanted to treat myself one night so I chose this movie.
I am a sci-fi fan and when you take a drama, put in some humor, and add dinos and other creatures - I'm a sucker.
I really like the way this series keep building upon past episodes.
It is enjoyable to watch the characters grow and learn to work together.
For me the season started slowly but as it grew and the characters emerged it captured me.
Sort of a slow start but it will draw you in.
The quality of this video is excellent.
The acting was good - it was the script that suffered.
I am a Jackie Chan fan so wanted to see this even with a low rating.
Sandra is one of my favorite actresses and this was a wonderful find.
This is indeed a masterpiece bringing the viewer with it through so many different emotions.
I do highly recommend seeing this movie.
I did shed tears several times.
This was a quite fascinating movie and the acting excellent.

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and drama genres, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They enjoy emotional and immersive experiences, often resonating deeply with the content they watch.
